home.title: Cocobiches · Three houses in Versailles
home.description: Three independent hotels steps from the Palace of Versailles. Hôtel d'Angleterre, Hôtel du Jeu de Paume, Apparts de l'Oncle Louis. Hospitality at human scale, run by the same family for fifteen years.

brand.title: Cocobiches · family hotel group in Versailles
brand.description: Cocobiches brings together three independent houses in Versailles. A family of owner-operators, human-scale hospitality, steps from the Palace.

footer.tagline: Three houses in Versailles. One family, one hospitality.
footer.signature: An independent family brand, founded in Versailles.

cookie.title: Cookies
cookie.body: We use audience measurement cookies to understand what's useful to you. Nothing intrusive, nothing sold on. You stay in control.

home.title: Versailles, with us.
home.subtitle: Three independent houses, run by the same family. Steps from the Palace, minutes from the gardens. Hospitality the old way · sincere, attentive, human.
home.hotelsTitle: One family. Three ways to stay in Versailles.
home.hotelsLead: Each house has its own character, history and habits. We run all three · and let you pick the one that feels right.

angleterre.name: Hôtel d'Angleterre
angleterre.desc: A confidential 3-star, a five-minute walk from the Palace. Cream-toned rooms, breakfast served late, and the kind of quiet you notice.

jeudepaume.name: Hôtel du Jeu de Paume
jeudepaume.desc: Our mother house. A living room in shades of water-green, a kitchen that smells of warm butter in the morning, two modular seminar rooms. The place you come back to.

onclelouis.name: Apparts de l'Oncle Louis
onclelouis.desc: Apartments conceived as Versailles homes. Equipped kitchens, linen sheets, north light. For a night, a week or a season.

home.manifestoTitle: We believe a hotel is, first and foremost, a home.
home.manifestoBody: We don't belong to a listed group. We don't speak of "product" · we speak of rooms, breakfasts, neighbours. We run these three houses the way our grandparents ran theirs: with patience, with fresh linen, with every guest's name kept in mind.

valuesSection.footer: We publish an annual CSR report · available on request.

c1.body: Decisions are made between owner-operators, for houses we know room by room. No committee in Paris, no outside shareholders.
c1.proof: Our three hotels have belonged to the Comyn family since acquisition · with no brand delegation.

c2.body: Teams you meet again from one stay to the next. Food cooked in our own kitchens. Houses with soul · respected as they are.
c2.proof: 100% of our food is made in-house by our brigade, led by Maÿlis.

c3.body: Coffee in our lounge, a walk in the Park, a restaurant we whisper in your ear. A stay that goes beyond a single night.

stats.label: three formats for three ways to stay

c4.body: Seasonal produce, short supply chains, durable materials, permanent contracts. A measured approach, tracked in numbers, improving every year.

metrics.label: of our seminar guests arrive by public transport
of our team on stable contracts, trained in-house

home.numbersLead: No vague promises · just what we actually do, published openly every quarter.

houses.label: Houses in Versailles
houses.detail: All within a 10-minute walk of each other

rooms.label: Rooms & apartments
rooms.detail: From entry-level rooms to family suites

years.label: Years of operation
years.detail: Same family, same teams, same neighbourhood

home.whyLead: What you don't always find elsewhere, and that we hold on to, season after season.
home.why1: An independent, family-owned group. No outside shareholder, no brand to defend · just our three houses and the reputation we build for them.
home.why2: We bake our bread in the morning. We work with twenty-three producers from the Île-de-France. Breakfast lasts as long as the coffee's hot.
home.why3: Our teams live in Versailles. They know the baker on rue Hoche, the quiet hour at the gardens, the table that still serves dinner after 10pm. Just ask.
home.why4: 62% local produce in the kitchen. 100% permanent contracts. Zero single-use plastic since 2023. Full figures are published openly on the Commitments page.
home.mapBody: Our three houses form a triangle, all within a 10-minute walk of the Palace. Direct RER C from Paris, Rive Droite access in 35 minutes, parking at each address. Arrive light · we take care of the rest.
home.journalLead: Stay ideas, confidential addresses, behind-the-scenes from our houses. Our teams share what they know by heart.
home.pressLead: Condé Nast Traveler, Le Figaro, Télérama, Monocle, The Guardian · some of the outlets that have walked through our doors.

t1.quote: A real house. You arrive tired, you leave rested · and you come back.
t1.author: Hélène M.

t2.quote: The team knows Versailles better than I do, and I was born here. Addresses, opening hours, shortcuts · all of it.
t2.author: Julien R.

t3.quote: Three weeks at Oncle Louis. The apartment was perfect, the quiet too. We've left with habits.
t3.author: Anna & Thomas

home.newsletterLead: A letter every two months, signed by our teams. Seasons in Versailles, stay ideas, small openings before anyone else.

blog.soon: First articles coming soon. Subscribe to the newsletter to be notified.

1.title: Ten ways to see Versailles differently
1.excerpt: Beyond the Hall of Mirrors: secret gardens, small tables, afternoon walks. Our teams share the addresses you won't find in the guidebooks.

2.title: Hosting a seminar near the Palace
2.excerpt: Jeu de Paume offers two rooms for up to 40, on-site catering and a lounge for breaks. Here's how we work with your teams.

3.title: Where to lunch steps from the Palace
3.excerpt: A short, team-tested selection of Versailles tables, sorted by budget and neighbourhood. From 20-seater bistros to starred kitchens.

legal.title: Legal notice
legal.body: Site publisher: Cocobiches SAS, 78000 Versailles, France. Publication director: Élise Comyn. Contact: bonjour@cocobiches.com. Hosting: Vercel Inc., 440 N Barranca Ave #4133, Covina, CA 91723, USA. The cocobiches.fr website presents the Cocobiches hotel group and its three houses in Versailles. Bookings are made on each property's dedicated website.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.body: Cocobiches processes your data (name, email, message) only to respond to contact, newsletter and seminar quote forms. Legal basis: legitimate interest and consent for the newsletter. Retention: 3 years after last contact. You may access, rectify, erase or object by writing to dpo@cocobiches.com. Audience measurement: Plausible Analytics, cookieless, if you accept analytics cookies. No sale of data to third parties.

hotels.bookingNote: Check our live availability · best rate guaranteed on our websites.
